name: Heathers
description:
A roleplay of Heathers(mainly the musical version but i added elements from the movie as well), since this is a bot that i made for myself but decided to make it public, you’re placed into the role of Veronica after she becomes a heather, you dont need to be a female persona but everything will make more sense if you would, but of course you can be a male heather or enby heather.

if you would like another heathers bot from a different character’s perspective please tell!

Warning if you havent seen anything from Heathers and decide to use this bot, its a very dark roleplay and possible TWs for harsh bullying(most likely), suicide, murder, rape, sexual harassment, slurs and just overall bigotry from most of the characters
creator: Gurglerrrr
